case_title: ESSEX MANAGEMENT CORPORATION VS. JOHN DOE ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ESSEX MANAGEMENT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOE, JOHN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 530 BRANNAN STREET, #30-200, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94107; SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, LEASE FORFEITED, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 71104451)
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $84.50 PER DAY (DAILY RENTAL VALUE) (TRANSACTION ID # 71117317) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESSEX MANAGEMENT CORPORATION
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS (TRANSACTION ID # 100211940) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESSEX MANAGEMENT CORPORATION
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 71003792), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESSEX MANAGEMENT CORPORATION SERVED SEP-28-2023, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT ROES 1-10, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION OF JAIMIE BOMBARD, ESQ. REGARDING LOST ORIGINAL LEASE OR RENTAL AGREEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 71103399) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESSEX MANAGEMENT CORPORATION
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 71104451) AS TO DEFENDANT DOE, JOHN
UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (NO RENT DUE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESSEX MANAGEMENT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT DOE, JOHN ROES 1-10, INCLUSIVE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT DOE, JOHN
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESSEX MANAGEMENT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT DOE, JOHN ROES 1-10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
